task_completion.description: Enter Employee ID, First Name, and Last Name
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'EMP021' in the Employee ID field, 'Marcus' in the First Name field, and 'Chen' in the Last Name field (or displayed in the saved profile).
Screenshots show 'marcus.chen@acmeglobe.com' in the Email address field (or displayed in the saved profile).

task_completion.description: Select the correct Role and Department
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Employee' selected for the Role dropdown/field and 'Software Engineering' selected for the Department dropdown/field.
Screenshots show 'Software Engineer' selected for the Job Title dropdown/field.

task_completion.description: Enter today's date as the Date of Joining
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the current date (today's date at the time of the task execution) entered in the Date of Joining field.

task_completion.description: Successfully save the new employee record
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a success notification (e.g., 'Employee added successfully') or Marcus Chen's completed profile appearing in the Sentrifugo employee list/directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Sentrifugo web GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the Sentrifugo graphical user interface in a web browser, rather than using terminal commands, database clients, or API scripts to insert the record.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application form
integrity.visual_evidence: The data was entered into the actual Sentrifugo 'Add Employee' form fields, not just typed into a text editor or a mock webpage.

integrity.description: Agent did not use developer tools to spoof success
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open, ensuring the success state or employee list wasn't visually manipulated.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target employee (Marcus Chen, EMP021) is a synthetic persona. The Role ('Employee'), Department ('Software Engineering'), and Job Title ('Software Engineer') are pre-populated in the Sentrifugo database. Verify that the agent selects these exact pre-existing options in the UI and successfully saves the record.
